description_long: This object is a traditional spinning wheel, crafted primarily from light-colored wood with a smooth, matte finish. It features a large, spoked drive wheel mounted vertically on a sturdy rectangular frame, with a treadle pedal at the base for foot operation. The flyer assembly, including the bobbin and spindle, is positioned at one end of the frame, supported by turned wooden posts. The structure is reinforced with crossbars and angled supports, giving it stability and a classic, handcrafted appearance. The overall design is open, with visible mechanical components such as the drive band and flyer hooks. The object exudes a vintage, artisanal aesthetic, reminiscent of historical textile production tools.
description: A vintage-style wooden spinning wheel with a large spoked wheel, treadle pedal, and visible flyer assembly, all crafted in light wood.
description_view_0: Side view showing the large spoked wheel, treadle pedal, and flyer assembly clearly.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the thin profile and alignment of the frame and wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the spoked wheel and flyer assembly, with similar details to view 0.
description_view_3: End-on view from the flyer side, showing the flyer assembly and treadle in profile.
